title: Make the Web UI the only interface (reels = launch Studio)
description: The reels CLI currently exposes run/doctor/web. Decision: the web UI is the only way to drive the pipeline. Remove the run command, make bare 'reels' launch Reels Studio (host/port/config options), keep doctor, promote the web optional-dependency extra into required deps, rewrite README around the web-only flow.
close_reason: Web UI is the only interface: bare reels launches Studio, run/web removed, web deps required, README rewritten

title: Silence Remover web tool: remove silent passages from uploaded video
description: Standalone Reels Studio tool (separate from the reels pipeline): upload a video, detect silences with ffmpeg silencedetect, compute keep segments in a pure domain service, re-render with trim+concat, download the result. Design spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-18-silence-removal-design.md
